/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib "CMakeFiles/xc-consistency.dir/xc-consistency.c.o" -o xc-consistency  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/build/deps/src/libxc-build ../libxc.15.dylib
